description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:3 Docker image with two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage define a test job that runs `pip install pytest`, `pip3 install .`, and `python3 -m pytest tests/*.py`. In the deploy stage define a deploy job that runs only on the release branch, writes a ~/.pypirc file containing the PyPI repository URL, username sj1k and the secret $PIP_PASSWORD, then executes `python3 setup.py sdist upload -r pypi` to publish the package to PyPI.
